quick_fill_placeholder: tahchunhnak "Sianginn nih amah a tuah lengmi langhter awk a sawmmi tikah math chungah cazual a thlak, sayanu nih daihte in lam a leng ter"
nl_edit_placeholder: tahchunhnak "a chuahmi kha sayanu nih lam leng a tertu tiah thlen"
reinforce_step_1: Donghnak ngan tein thawk (tahchunhnak, FR-1 asiloah FR-2)
reinforce_step_2: Langhternak a zungzal cangtikah (~80%), ratio kha 1-2 in tamter
reinforce_step_3: Aa thlen khomi schedule (VR) ah kal in cohlannak fak deuh awkah
reinforce_step_5: Caanthawk lo le cuangcuangmi donghnak ah leng
fidelity_tip_1: Rianttuantu hawile he tuahning lam kha hmuhletnak tuah
fidelity_tip_2: BST (Behavioral Skills Training) thabik thlamh in pek
fidelity_tip_4: Tuahnak ah hramthlanmi a um lomi kong kha ruahnak chih
record_tip_1: Langhternak a chuah hlanah, a chuahning ah, le a chuah dih hnuah zeidah a cangmi kha thlapi
record_tip_2: A khawhmi tikah hmun le hmunhma kha rak chim
record_tip_3: Thilthar tampi kha na chinh khawh
record_tip_4: Langhmi le langh kho rih in chimchunhnak hman
quiz_opt_identify_why: Zei ruangah dah langhternak a chuah ti hngalh awkah
quiz_opt_any_stops: Buainak a dongtertu langhternak zeibantuk paoh
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: Chawlhcang? Bawmhnak? Aho hmanh nih ngaihnak? Hmun?
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Team note kha chinh... (Shift+Enter line thar awkah)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Hramthlannak, hmuahhmuah harnak, asiloah a chuahmi harnak kha chinh... tahchunhnak, "Sianginn cun holh a hailam zong a ngei" asiloah "Hi cu middle school sianginn a si"
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Adang thildang (ngakchia kha a ba maw, a tam maw, le adang...) ...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Na cawngpiak duhmi senario kha chimchunh...
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Sianginn persona kha chimchunh... tahchunhnak, "Nangmah cu 3rd-tar sianginn na si, math chungah lungretheihnak na nei i na ttap le na ngaihchih thluahmah"
ph.describe_what_your_child_did: Na ngakchia nih zei a tuah dah ti kha chimchunh...
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: tahchunhnak "Token economy nih math cawnpiaknak chungah off-task langhternak a tlawmter maw?"
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: tahchunhnak, "Sianginn cu a thinhun le tuahning hmuhpiaknak zulh a duh lo."
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: tahchunhnak "autism a ngeimi sianginn", "ADHD zong khat tein a ngeimi", "sianginn ah a thar"
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Scale awkah langhternak goal kha chinh (tahchunhnak, "Sianginn cu mahte rian ttuannak chungah minit 15 chung thut nakah a um lai")
ph.items_separated_by_semicolons: Thil pawl kha semicolon in thla
ph.rationale_which_antecedent_does_this_: Tikuat (zei antecedent dah hi nih a kal piaktu?)
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Na tuahning kha ruahnak chih...
• Zei dah ttha tein a rian a ttuan?
• Zei dah aa dangmi tein na tuah lai?
• Zei strategy dah na cawngpiak duh thluahmah?
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Inn ah zei na hmuh dah ti kha chim — thazaang, lungretheihnak pawl, nunphung kong, asiloah sianginn team caah ruahnak chihnak...
ph.type_language_eg_spanish_arabic_somal: Holh kha ttial (tahchunhnak, Spanish, Arabic, Somali)
ph.type_your_observation_note_or_click_t: Na zohphunh, note kha ttial, asiloah mic ah click in chim...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a: Hikah na lehnak ttial. Aa tlinmi le riantuannak holh tein hman...
ph.what_behavior_will_change: Zei langhternak dah a thlen lai?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ: Nangmah asiloah mi upa nih aa dangmi in zei dah na tuah khawh lai?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: Hmunhma thlennak zei dah na tuah lai?
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional: Zei nih dah hibantuk in na sihter? (a duhmi)
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: Hibantuk in na sih hlanah zei dah a cangmi?
